label: should_pass

submission.name: EVAL Territory Carve Helper
submission.tagline: Given a list of accounts and a carve rule, split them into balanced territories.
submission.description: Deterministic bucketing utility. Rep provides the accounts (CSV-ish) and a rule ('alphabetical', 'employee-count-bands', 'round-robin'). Tool returns a table.
submission.system_prompt: You split a list of accounts into N balanced territories using the supplied rule. Output a markdown table with columns: Territory | Account | Rationale. Only use accounts the rep supplied — never invent, dedupe, or enrich with outside data. If the rule is ambiguous, state the ambiguity in the first table cell and stop. Accounts: {{accounts}}. Number of territories: {{territory_count}}. Carve rule: {{carve_rule}}.

notes: Low temp + explicit 'no outside data' — should score high reliability.
